name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Raw
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a raw code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Code
config_entries.description: The raw code to send as a list of integers. Positive numbers represent a digital high signal and negative numbers a digital low signal. The number itself encodes how long the signal should last (in microseconds).

config_entries.label: Carrier Frequency
config_entries.description: Optionally set a frequency to send the signal with for infrared signals. Defaults to `0Hz`.
